title: 256K single-user decode — AWQ vs FP8 (+ spec-decode draft)
subtitle: 2x R9700 TP=2, single-user, fp8 KV. Every model here reaches 256K in AWQ or FP8; 4 bars/model = AWQ no-spec, AWQ+draft, FP8 no-spec, FP8+draft
note: We only care about 256K single-user. This fleet = models with an FP8 variant (so AWQ-vs-FP8 is a real contrast) that reach true single-user 256K in AWQ and/or FP8. Per-model 4 values: awq_nospec / awq_spec / fp8_nospec / fp8_spec (null → rendered '—' = not built / not reachable / no working draft). awq_nospec = freshest measured short-ctx decode from the 2026-05-31 sweep (benchmarks/<slug>/results.json) where a slug exists, else the 2026-05-27 fp8-comparison ref. fp8_nospec = fp8-comparison fp8_toks (2026-05-27 short-ctx ref, not re-measured post-fix). awq_spec = AWQ-production spec-decode (benchmarks/specdecode.json working ships, --speculative-attention-mode decode @ TP2). fp8_spec = FP8-target spec-decode (only Coder-30B EAGLE3 86 + Qwen3.6-35B DFlash 45 reach 256K). Where a model's FP8 caps below 256K (Qwen3-VL-32B ~159K) its fp8 cells are null per 'we only care about 256K'. DROPPED (sub-256K in BOTH formats, weight/native-ctx bound): gemma-4-31B (dense, AWQ ~105K / FP8 ~51K), Coder-Next-80B + Coder-Next-REAM-60B (131K-native), Devstral-2-24B (FP8-only ~180K). Reconciliation: gemma-4-26B AWQ was drifting (README 30 / old fp8-comparison 15) — the 2026-05-31 sweep measures 31.9 short-ctx, used everywhere. Devstral-24B(v1) AWQ no-spec = 10.2 (2026-05-31 sweep, internally consistent with conc=1 TPOT 97ms; supersedes the stale 37 short-ctx ref). FP8+draft works @256K only for the two A3B-MoE models (Coder-30B EAGLE3 ~86, Qwen3.6-35B DFlash ~45 via --chunked-prefill 2048). Dense/DeltaNet/SWA have no working int4-or-fp8 draft on this box (drafts OOM the VRAM-tight DeltaNet KV, or no published draft).

models.name: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B
models.note: AWQ no-spec sweep 25.6; AWQ+EAGLE3 97; FP8+EAGLE3 86 @256K (361MB draft)

models.name: Qwen3.5-27B
models.note: AWQ no-spec sweep 14.4. No working draft: z-lab DFlash 3.3GB OOMs DeltaNet, int4-MTP graft accepts ~0

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B
models.note: AWQ no-spec = fp8-comparison ref (no sweep slug). Same draft block as Qwen3.5-27B

models.name: gemma-4-26B-A4B
models.note: AWQ no-spec sweep 31.9 (reconciles the 30/15 drift). 256K via triton flash. No DFLASH hook; base EAGLE3 accept ~1.34

models.name: Devstral-24B
models.note: AWQ no-spec = 2026-05-31 sweep 10.2 (supersedes stale 37). FP8 par/clean dense 256K win. No published draft

models.name: Qwen3-VL-32B
models.note: AWQ 256K but no measured no-spec tok/s -> '—'. FP8 caps ~159K (<256K) -> NA per 256K-only. VL spec broken #17935

models.name: Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni-30B
models.note: FP8-only (no AWQ build). 256K via triton flash. No published/bundled draft (Nano excluded from MTP)
